name: Dimerix Limited
analysis: It is coming off a base, 70% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (2.8× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.2000, stop A$0.1559, target A$0.2300 (0.68:1) — then trail it.
